title: BEM-840 force queue marker
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:01 (UTC+3)'
# Add a standalone marker script and a short runner step. This avoids long YAML and proves whether the queue section executes.
marker=Path('scripts/mark_queue_processor_step_seen.sh')
marker.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\nmkdir -p governance/state governance/workflow_dispatch_results\nnow="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"\nprintf '{"status":"queue_processor_step_seen","time":"%s"}\\n' "$now" > governance/state/queue_processor_step_seen.json\nprintf '{"status":"queue_processor_step_seen","time":"%s"}\\n' "$now" > governance/workflow_dispatch_results/queue_processor_step_seen.status.json\n''')
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
step='''\n      - name: Queue processor execution marker\n        if: always()\n        run: bash scripts/mark_queue_processor_step_seen.sh\n'''
changed=False
if runner.exists() and 'Queue processor execution marker' not in text:
    anchor='      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue'
    if anchor in text:
        text=text.replace(anchor,step+anchor,1)
    else:
        anchor2='      - name: Complete job'
        if anchor2 in text:
            text=text.replace(anchor2,step+anchor2,1)
        else:
            text=text+step
    runner.write_text(text)
    changed=True
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'queue_processor_execution_marker_installed','runner_changed':changed,'marker_script':str(marker),'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_force_queue_processor_execution_marker.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_force_queue_processor_execution_marker.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Force Queue Processor Execution Marker | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: run fresh Codex tick and verify governance/state/queue_processor_step_seen.json plus workflow_dispatch_results marker. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Queue processor execution marker installed. Next: tick and verify marker/result.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(marker),str(runner),'governance/state/bem840_force_queue_processor_execution_marker.json','governance/reports/bem840_force_queue_processor_execution_marker.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Installed a direct queue processor execution marker step in codex-runner to prove whether the queue processing section executes at all')
"""
No issue comments.
